TITLE Butternut Lentil Stew

# Prepare: dice [1 item yellow onion] and [1/2 item butternut squash], grate [2 tbl ginger], mince [4 cloves garlic],  
# In a dutch oven heat [3 tbl olive oil] saute onion until soft. 
# Add ginger, garlic, squash. cook until fragrant, about 2 minutes. 
# Stir in [2 tsp garam masala], [1 tsp turmeric] and [1/2 tsp cayenne pepper] and bloom.
# Add [3 cup water]. Season with [salt] and [pepper] and bring to a simmer.
# Simmer until the butternut is tender.
# Stir in [14 oz coconut milk], [1 cup cooked lentils] and [3 cup [chopped] kale], and simmer until kale softens 5 
# Remove from the heat and stir in [1/3 cup [chopped] cilantro].
